items.headline: So You Got an Allocation of SpaceX Shares. Now Do You Sell or Hold?
items.summary: SpaceX allocated approximately 20% of its shares to retail investors at $135 apiece.  Anthony Saglimbene, the chief market strategist at Ameriprise Financial, said he expects many retail investors who were given shares of SpaceX to forgo selling and hold them for the long run.  What’s more, by flipping their shares, investors could risk their chances at early access to future IPOs.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.

items.headline: Wells Fargo’s FiNet Recruits $650 Million Team From Stifel
items.summary: Wells Fargo  Advisors has notched another recruiting win for its FiNet independent channel, bringing on an advisory team that oversaw more than $650 million in client assets from  Stifel  Independent Advisors.  The Rebich Investments team, based in Edinboro, Pa., joined Wells Fargo on Monday, according to registration records.  The 10-person team is led by Eli Rebich, and includes advisors Brian Long, Greg Keil, Zane Wright, and Rebich’s daughter, Allison Rebich.
items.why_it_matters: News appears more supportive of sentiment or growth expectations.
